title: An Immigration System for Canada’s Future: Strengthening our communities - Canada.ca
content:
## An immigration system for Canada’s future: Strengthening our communities

## An Immigration System for Canada’s Future
Strengthening our communities
A message from the Minister of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship
Why immigration is central to Canada’s future, and why we need to plan now for that future
Key takeaways from engagement with stakeholders and the general public

## A plan to get us there
Planned measures and initiatives for the future
